leadership.name: Dr. Shamanur Shivashankarappa
leadership.quote: Education is not just about earning degrees; it's about building character and contributing to the welfare of society.
leadership.description: A visionary leader and statesman whose dedication has transformed Davangere into a prominent educational hub of South India.

anthem.title: BEA Anthem
lines: Knowledge is Power, Service is Worship
Lighting the torch of wisdom in every heart
Building a nation, one scholar at a time
Bapuji leads the way to a brighter dawn

davangere.title: About Davangere
davangere.description: Known as the Manchester of Karnataka, Davangere is a vibrant educational hub blending industrial legacy with academic innovation.
